note: Three tiers. easy/recipe: response-graded on the block, config keys, default networks, iconset and sizing. medium/introspection: setup writes a known enabled-networks set / icon width live, agent reads it back, cleanup restores defaults. hard/execution: reset restores install defaults, agent configures a required network set + icon size, verify reads better_social_sharing_buttons.settings live (exit 0 = pass).

evals.prompt: How does the Better Social Sharing Buttons module put share buttons on a Drupal page, and does it call any external tracking service to do it? Name the block plugin id.
evals.expected_output: It provides a block (plugin id social_sharing_buttons_block, admin_label 'Better Social Sharing Buttons'), plus optional node/paragraph pseudo-fields and Twig Tweak. Each button is a plain link to the network's own share URL opened in a new tab — no external API, tracker, or ad-server calls — and icons come from a single inlined minified SVG sprite.

evals.prompt: Which Drupal config object holds Better Social Sharing Buttons' global settings, and which keys control the icon size and the icon set? What are their default values?
evals.expected_output: Config object better_social_sharing_buttons.settings. `width` sets the icon size (default 20px), `radius` the corner radius (default 3px), and `iconset` the icon set: social-icons--square (colored, default) or social-icons--no-color (flat).

evals.prompt: Out of the box, which social networks does Better Social Sharing Buttons enable by default, and where in the admin UI do you change the enabled set?
evals.expected_output: Enabled by default: Facebook, X, Email, LinkedIn (all other networks ship disabled). Change them on the settings form at /admin/config/services/better_social_sharing_buttons/config (route better_social_sharing_buttons.config), which needs the 'administer site configuration' permission.

evals.prompt: On this Drupal 11 site, inspect the live Better Social Sharing Buttons configuration and report the current icon size (width) and which icon set is selected.
evals.expected_output: The live better_social_sharing_buttons.settings has width = 44px and iconset = social-icons--no-color (set by the setup script).

evals.prompt: This Drupal 11 site already has Better Social Sharing Buttons configured. Inspect the live configuration and list exactly which social networks are currently enabled.
evals.expected_output: The enabled services are exactly whatsapp, telegram, and bluesky (all other networks disabled), as written by the setup script into better_social_sharing_buttons.settings services.

evals.prompt: On this Drupal 11 site, configure the global Better Social Sharing Buttons settings so that exactly these four networks are enabled and no others: Facebook, X, LinkedIn, and WhatsApp. Also set the icon size to 32px. Make the change stick on the live site.
evals.expected_output: better_social_sharing_buttons.settings: services has exactly facebook, x, linkedin, whatsapp enabled (all others disabled) and width = 32px. Verified by reading the live config.

evals.prompt: On this Drupal 11 site, switch the Better Social Sharing Buttons to the flat monochrome icon set and make the icons circular. Apply it to the live global settings.
evals.expected_output: better_social_sharing_buttons.settings: iconset = social-icons--no-color and radius = 100%. Verified against live config.
